goals: Explore the project structure to understand what kind of application this is
Find files that might contain financial calculations or reporting logic
Search for specific financial terms to understand how calculations are implemented

user_agent_config.personality: Analytical and cautious. Prefers concrete facts over abstract explanations. Only interested in mainstream, proven solutions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands business and financial concepts but has no technical programming knowledge. Does not know tool names or how to read code syntax.

end_condition: The user has explored the codebase structure and found files relevant to their financial evaluation.
